title: Party Invites Kids Party Invitations Pack of 36 Birthday Party Invitations Childrens Birthday Party Boys Girls Kids Invites with Folding Envelope Design and Holographic Stickers (Rainbow)
features: BALLOON PARTY INVITATIONS: Pack of 36 cleverly designed childrens party invitations. They are A5 in size which is 145x105mm and include space to write down the name/s of your guests, the date, time, place and the person to RSVP too.

FOLDING ENVELOPE DESIGN: These invitations have been cleverly designed with a doulbe sided print, so that once you have written on them, you can fold them closed and they will look like an envelope. The envelope has a super cool "Air Mail" style design and on the back it features a confetti pattern to really set the party mood!

INCLUDES HOLOGRAPHIC STICKERS: This pack of invites includes 36 super cool "YOU'RE INVITED" holographic stickers which are used to seal your invitations shut once you've written them out. The pack includes 3 different colours, blue, orange and yellow. You're guests will be super excited when they receive on of these invites.

PREMIUM QUALITY CARD: Our invites are designed in the UK and printed on 250gsm card stock. Easy to write on and easy to fold, they make the perfect way to invite friends and family to your special Birthday party.
ECO FRIENDLY: Every part of our invitations can be fully recycled and we help support sustainability by planting trees here in the UK.
description: Product Description About Us BestaFiesta is a UK based company that designs and manufactures EVERYTHING FUN! We are very proud to say all our products are 100% designed by our amazing research and development team right here in the UK. The team work tirelessly to constantly find new quirky and fun products. Whether you are looking for gifts for the one off occasions in the year like Valentines Day, Mothers Day, Fathers Day etc or your looking for the perfect seasonal card. We have it all under one roof! Not only that but as a business we care about the environment and are constantly looking for ways to reduce our carbon footprint. Bumper Size Pack of 36 Invitations Our bumper pack of children's party invitations include a whopping 36 invites! Enough to go round the whole class or to be spread over multiple parties. If you don't use them all up on 1 party put them in a drawer and save them for the next! Plenty of Space to Write Down all Your Party Information Each invitation has plenty of space for you to write down the information about the party. Just put your child's name on the dotted line under "YOU'RE INVITED TO" followed by the date, time, place of the party and who to respond to. The super bright design of this invite has proven incredibly popular with children and is an ideal invite for both boys and girls. Each Pack Includes 36 Holographic "YOU'RE INVITED" Stickers This super cool party invite design is double sided. On one side you have the actual party invite that you write all the information on and on the other side there is a "BIRTHDAY MAIL" envelope design. You fold the invite shut and then seal it with one of the holographic "YOU'RE INVTED" stickers which are included with the pack. There is a total of 36 stickers included in Orange, Blue and Yellow. You will receive 12 of each colour. Let your little one decide which friend is given which colour. Each sticker has a highly attractive and dazzling holographic shiny edge which gives the invite a bit of birthday sparkle! How do Our Invites Work? Step 1 Fill out of all the required information about your party. This includes who's party it is, the date, time and place along with who to reply to. Step 2 Now you need to fold the invitation in two places so that it closes on itself. Try to fold along the airmail red, white and blue stripe lines. Step 3 Now write the name of the person you're inviting to your party. Step 4 Seal the invite closed with one of the holographic "YOU'RE INVITED" stickers. These come in 3 colours, Orange, Blue and Yellow. Unique "Birthday Airmail" Designed Envelope Once you've finished writing and sealing the invites they look great. The invite has a uniquely designed "Birthday Airmail" style envelope and features the words "SPECIAL INVITATION INSIDE". Once sealed they fit easily into a school bag Once the invites are folded they measure 15cm x 10cm so are easy for children to hold and will fit neatly in a school bag, ready to be handed out. Thumbs Up from Our Happy Customers We've had lots of great comments from our customers! We're sure your little ones will love these invites too.
